exam_price_notes: BCSP exam fee $399. Administered by BCSP in partnership with ASSP.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE authorized test centers. Online proctoring not available.

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with full name and signature. Name must match BCSP registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. Score reported on a scale of 0–800; passing score is 460. Exams are administered by BCSP (Board of Certified Safety Professionals) in partnership with ASSP.
renewal_options: Earn 30 Continuance of Certification (COC) points (equivalent to 30 hours of continuing education) every 5 years and pay the annual maintenance fee. Points earned through safety-related coursework, presentations, publications, and professional activities.

prerequisites.description: 3 years of construction health and safety experience with at least 35% of time devoted to construction safety

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between attempts. Full exam fee required for retake.

official_study_resources.title: BCSP Examination Information Guides
official_study_resources.notes: Official exam content outlines and information guides available on the BCSP website

aliases: construction health and safety technician chst
